completed_tasks.name: RESEARCH.md (HIGH confidence; 9 pitfalls; Validation Architecture section)
gsd-plan-checker passed on iteration 2/3 (3 BLOCKERs + 6 MAJORs + 4 MINORs all resolved)

remaining_tasks.name: Execute Wave 1: Plan 01 (Security Rules + indexes + test infra audit) + Plan 02 (notifications.js module + startAfter re-export)
Execute Wave 2: Plan 03 (bell markup + CSS + auth.js hooks + index.html bootstrap import) + Plan 04 (history page view + router registration)
Execute Wave 3: Plan 05 (UAT + production deploy of rules+indexes + STATE/ROADMAP updates) — has 2 human-verify checkpoints

human_actions_pending.context: Plan 05 Task 4 — must happen in same commit window as first addDoc to notifications collection (CLAUDE.md 'Add Security Rules first' rule)
Plan 05 Task 2 — zero-build SPA has no DOM test framework; UAT script lives in 83-VALIDATION.md (~10 min walk-through)

decisions.decision: Run research before planning despite research_enabled: false in config
decisions.rationale: User explicitly chose 'Research first' at the gate; HIGH-confidence RESEARCH.md surfaced 3 critical pitfalls (mobile bell layout, missing startAfter re-export, listener-cleanup-on-logout vs view-destroy)

decisions.decision: Skip UI-SPEC generation, plan from CONTEXT.md alone
decisions.rationale: User chose 'Continue without UI-SPEC' — CONTEXT.md already locks bell placement (D-01/D-02), dropdown behavior (D-03/D-04), route (D-09), mobile rules. Bell+dropdown closely mirrors existing Admin nav-dropdown pattern.

decisions.decision: Static-import app/notifications.js in index.html bootstrap (not deferred load)
decisions.rationale: BLOCKER-3 from plan-checker iteration 1: window.* registrations happen on module load. Without explicit import, every bell onclick would throw ReferenceError and auth.js if-guard would silently no-op.

decisions.decision: Bell wrapper as sibling of .nav-links (not child)
decisions.rationale: Pitfall 1 from RESEARCH.md: at ≤768px .nav-links { display: none }. D-02 requires bell visible on mobile. Sibling placement survives mobile breakpoint.

decisions.decision: Extract verify scripts to .cjs files (not inline node -e)
decisions.rationale: MAJOR-7 from plan-checker iteration 1: multi-layer shell escaping fragile on Windows bash. Project package.json has type: module so .cjs extension is required for require() in Node scripts.

decisions.decision: destroyNotifications() hooked at 3 sites in app/auth.js (NOT in any view destroy)
decisions.rationale: D-13: bell persists across all views. Cleanup must tie to logout/auth-clear, not view navigation, otherwise listener leaks and stale state on re-login.

decisions.decision: Mobile flex tweak consolidated in styles/components.css
decisions.rationale: MINOR-10: investigation confirmed .top-nav-content rule lives in components.css (4 occurrences). Splitting across components.css and views.css would create duplicate @media blocks.

decisions.decision: NOTIFICATION_TYPES enum ships 9 keys including PROPOSAL_SUBMITTED + PROPOSAL_DECIDED
decisions.rationale: D-06: avoids constants-module churn in Phase 87 when proposal triggers wire up.

uncommitted_files: .planning/ROADMAP.md (modified — Phase 83 plan list TBD → 5 plans + progress row 0/5)
next_action: Run /clear, then /gsd:execute-phase 83 to start Wave 1 (Plans 01 + 02 in parallel).
context_notes: Phase 83 planning is fully complete and verified — 5 plans / 15 tasks / 3 waves / 7 NOTIF requirements covered. Wave 1 starts Plans 01 (firestore rules + indexes + test/firestore.test.js audit) and 02 (app/notifications.js shared module + app/firebase.js startAfter re-export) in parallel; both have no dependencies. Plans are sized realistically — Plan 02 Task 2 is the largest single task (~250 line floor for app/notifications.js with 9 exports + 6 window regs + dev test writer + JSDoc). Three blocking issues from the first verification pass were all surgically addressed by the planner: notifications.js is now statically imported by the index.html bootstrap module (was the biggest miss — bell would have been dead-on-arrival without this), bell placement is unambiguously BEFORE .nav-links, and the brittle [\s\S]{0,800} regex was replaced with .cjs verify scripts that are Windows-bash safe. Per project config commit_docs: false, all 17 new/modified files are uncommitted — this WIP commit will package them. v3.3 is the active milestone branch.
